utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 fields by name. Now check full specification details per item: 
- destination: Provided (Lisbon, Portugal) — fully specified.
- travel_dates: Provided (June 20th, 2024 - June 24th, 2024) — specific dates given; however the user requested a 5-day trip, while the dates span 4 nights/5 calendar days depending on interpretation; still counts as specified dates.
- transportation: Has type (round-trip flights), route (Paris to Lisbon), booking_reference, and cost (€600). Flight details could include airline/times but the format only requires flight details with costs; provided sufficiently.
- accommodation: Has hotel name, confirmation_number, and cost (€700) — meets “hotel selection with costs.”
- activities: List with names and individual costs (€60 and €80) — meets requirement of selected activities with costs.
- additional_services: Provided as “None” — acceptable as specified.
- total_budget: Provided as “€1,440” but lacks a complete cost breakdown itemization; it’s a single total with no breakdown. The format explicitly says “complete cost breakdown,” so this is not fully specified.
Thus, 6 items are fully specified; 1 (total_budget) is missing the required breakdown.
